title: Key-Based Partitioning in Hadoop MapReduce
description: The 'lib/partition' directory in Hadoop MapReduce architecture contains custom partitioners for data distribution. These partitioners, including BinaryPartitioner, HashPartitioner, KeyFieldBasedPartitioner, and RehashPartitioner, employ various strategies like byte subarray, hash code, Unix-like sorting, and rehashing. They extend the Hadoop 'Partitioner' class, showcasing the Strategy design pattern for diverse partitioning needs. Collaboration is achieved through extending a common superclass, enabling flexible data distribution across reduce tasks.
